scripts.build: npm run build -w client && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w functions
scripts.start: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run preview -w client -- --host 0.0.0.0 --port 5175" "npm run start -w server"
scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c blue,green "npm run dev -w client" "npm run dev -w server"
